meta.description: Evidence packet for dev.to 5-repo article review

fastapi.note: 499 is MDS-specific count from case study; 360 is total finding count in benchmark corpus

django.draft_claim: score remained stable across many releases, then dropped after deprecation cleanup
django.note: Trend claim based on case study analysis; no specific finding count asserted in draft

pydantic.note: 117 is EDS-specific count from case study; 221 is total finding count in benchmark corpus

paramiko.draft_claim: 5 god-module candidates and 18 circular import chains (AVS + CIR)
paramiko.case_study_heading: 5 God Module Candidates (AVS), 18 Circular Import Chains (CIR), 54 Unexplained High-Complexity Functions (EDS)
paramiko.note: Shallow clone, drift v2.5.3, 55 files, 962 functions, 5.8s analysis time

drift_self.draft_claim: stable short-term trend with visible sensitivity to focused refactors
drift_self.note: drift_self has benchmark data (score 0.514, 80 findings) but the specific trend claim is not supported by a stored trend artifact

evidence_gaps: drift_self: trend claim not backed by a stored trend comparison artifact
all repos (except paramiko): benchmark data was generated at unknown date; drift version of the runs is not recorded in all_results.json
recommendation: All 5 repos now have evidence. drift_self trend claim should be reframed or backed by a stored trend artifact.
